title: Expository Visualization
description: Designed a static expository visualization analyzing 50,000+ food items from Walmart, Target, and Whole Foods. Explored relationships between food processing levels, nutritional content, and pricing across stores using the GroceryDB dataset.

title: Hidden Markov Model for Electricity Demand
description: Designed and trained a three-state Hidden Markov Model to classify hourly California electricity demand into low, medium, and high regimes using price and load data.

title: N-Gram
description: Engineered an N-gram language model with recursive back-off using a text corpus as the training source.

title: Loan Application Analysis
description: Cleaned and preprocessed real-world loan data to study lender decision-making using only approved loan records.
